heading: Certification and report to Congress
label: 643 Certification and report to Congress

(a) and does not relate to the training of personnel.section 902(a) of Pub. L. 114–22section 642(a) of this titleSection 402 of Pub. L. 114–22section 21301 of Title 34This subchapter, referred to in subsec. (b), was in the original “this title”, meaning title IX of , which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of title IX to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 114–22
CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Justice for Victims of Trafficking Act of 2015, and not as part of the Homeland Security Act of 2002 which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: Certification
children.label: a Certification
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Secretary shall certify to Congress that all personnel referred to in section 402(a) have successfully completed the training required under that section.May 29, 20151See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Report to Congress
children.label: b Report to Congress
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , and annually thereafter, the Secretary shall report to Congress with respect to the overall effectiveness of the program required by this subchapter, the number of cases reported by Department personnel in which human trafficking was suspected, and, of those cases, the number of cases that were confirmed cases of human trafficking.May 29, 2015
